{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Li Soulsmiths
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] has [[Soulsmiths]] who lead projects involving [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
